dict.string: Jarvis needs permission to control Spotify and Apple Music so the notch can show what's playing and respond to play/pause/skip.
Jarvis uses Apple Music to fetch animated artwork for the lock screen wallpaper.
Jarvis needs audio capture permission to display the real-time music waveform visualizer.
Jarvis needs microphone access so you can speak commands with Option-Space.
Jarvis needs screen recording permission to capture screenshots for context and assistant features.
Jarvis uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice.
